reasoning: Emotional axis (60%): Strong pass. Saturated teal badge background paired with warm orange-yellow arrow shaft hits the bright/warm/charming Hyrule mood precisely. Rounded badge silhouette reads as friendly toy-diorama. Color palette — teal, orange, white highlights, dark brown outlines — is unmistakably Zelda inventory style. Not grim or scary in any reading. Technical axis (40%): Pass. Hard 1px outlines visible and consistent around the arrow form and badge border. Shading uses 2-3 hard tone steps on the shaft (no gradient blending or anti-aliasing blur detected). Pixels appear grid-snapped with clean edges at all zoom levels shown. Fletching and arrowhead are legible and correctly detailed. Compared to Denzi peer reference, silhouette clarity and outline discipline are on par. Minor note: the arrow tip highlight could be one pixel sharper at native size, but this is not a failing issue. Combined weighted score: 0.6×8 + 0.4×8 = 8.0.
